case_title: JONATHAN LIM VS. KISHA NICHELL KLEIN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-03-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-13-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JONATHAN LIM IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KISHA NICHELL KLEIN IS PRESENT. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A $5000 PAYMENT TO THE PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE SEP 13TH HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT KLEIN, KISHA NICHELL
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT KLEIN, KISHA NICHELL
ORDER RE: RWQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM - GRANTED

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LIM, JONATHAN AS TO DEFENDANT KLEIN, KISHA NICHELL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-10-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE & REQUEST FOR RESET OF COURT DATE. (SUBMITTED ON SC-150 REQUEST FORM) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIM, JONATHAN
TRIAL RESET TO MAY-03-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF FEB-10-2021 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
